name: @career-ops/server
description: Hosted Career Ops ingestion service and infrastructure

scripts.bootstrap:dev: npm run build:packages && cdk bootstrap aws://054526846770/us-east-1
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:packages && cdk deploy CareerOps-Dev-Scanner --require-approval never
scripts.diff:dev: npm run build:packages && cdk diff CareerOps-Dev-Scanner
scripts.build:packages: npm --prefix ../../packages/shared-types run build && npm --prefix ../../packages/job-sources run build
